all.en: This brief outlines the upcoming summer campaign for our new beverage line.
all.zh: 本簡報概述我們新飲品系列的即將上線夏季活動。

all.en: The campaign will run for six weeks across three major social platforms.
all.zh: 本活動將於三大社群平台上持續六週。

all.en: Our primary audience consists of urban professionals aged twenty five to thirty four.
all.zh: 我們的主要受眾是二十五至三十四歲的都會專業人士。

all.en: The secondary audience includes college students who follow lifestyle creators.
all.zh: 次要受眾包含追蹤生活風格創作者的大學生。

all.en: The core message centers on refreshment during busy weekday afternoons.
all.zh: 核心訊息聚焦於忙碌平日午後的清新提振感受。

all.en: We will adopt a bright color palette inspired by tropical fruit and ocean tones.
all.zh: 我們將採用受熱帶水果與海洋色調啟發的明亮配色。

all.en: Short form video will serve as the main creative format on every channel.
all.zh: 短影音將作為各管道的主要創意格式。

all.en: Each video should be fifteen to thirty seconds long with captions enabled.
all.zh: 每支影片應為十五至三十秒長並啟用字幕。

all.en: We plan to publish three posts per week on Instagram and TikTok.
all.zh: 我們計畫於 Instagram 與 TikTok 每週發佈三則貼文。

all.en: Facebook will receive two posts weekly plus boosted carousel ads.
all.zh: Facebook 每週將獲得兩則貼文加上加強推廣的輪播廣告。

all.en: Paid media budget for the full campaign is set at fifty thousand dollars.
all.zh: 本活動全期付費媒體預算設定為五萬美元。

all.en: Organic content production will be handled by our in house creative team.
all.zh: 自然觸及內容製作將由我們的內部創意團隊負責。

all.en: We will partner with four micro influencers to extend authentic reach.
all.zh: 我們將與四位微型網紅合作以延伸真實的觸及範圍。

all.en: A branded hashtag will tie all user generated content together.
all.zh: 一個品牌專屬主題標籤將串連所有使用者生成內容。

all.en: Engagement rate and saved posts will be our two leading performance indicators.
all.zh: 互動率與貼文收藏數將是我們的兩項主要績效指標。

all.en: Click through rate from paid ads should reach at least two percent.
all.zh: 付費廣告的點擊率應至少達到百分之二。

all.en: Customer service will monitor comments daily to respond within four hours.
all.zh: 客服將每日監控留言以於四小時內回覆。

all.en: Weekly performance dashboards will be shared every Monday morning.
all.zh: 每週成效儀表板將於每週一上午分享。

all.en: Mid campaign optimization is planned for the end of the third week.
all.zh: 活動中期優化規劃於第三週週末進行。

all.en: Underperforming creative will be paused and replaced with stronger variants.
all.zh: 表現不佳的創意將被暫停並以更強的版本替換。

all.en: All assets must comply with our updated brand voice guidelines.
all.zh: 所有素材必須遵循我們最新版的品牌語調指南。

all.en: Legal review of every promotional claim is required before publishing.
all.zh: 每則促銷主張於發佈前皆須經法務審查。

all.en: A final wrap up report will be circulated within two weeks after the campaign ends.
all.zh: 最終總結報告將於活動結束後兩週內傳閱。

all.en: Please send your feedback on this brief by the end of Thursday.
all.zh: 請於週四下班前提供您對本簡報的回饋。

all.en: Localization adjustments will tailor regional creative for both Spanish and French markets.
all.zh: 在地化調整將為西班牙語及法語市場量身打造區域性創意內容。

all.en: User generated content rights must be cleared through standard release agreements.
all.zh: 使用者生成內容之使用權須透過標準授權書取得。

all.en: Sampling activations at urban events will support digital efforts through experiential touchpoints.
all.zh: 都會活動之試飲體驗將透過實體接觸點支援數位行銷工作。

all.en: Retail partner co marketing opportunities have been mapped for key launch windows.
all.zh: 已盤點主要上市時段之零售夥伴聯合行銷機會。

all.en: Email newsletter teasers will warm up subscribers two weeks before the public launch.
all.zh: 電子報預告將於正式上市前兩週為訂閱戶預熱。

all.en: Search engine marketing keywords have been researched and approved by the digital team.
all.zh: 搜尋引擎行銷關鍵字已由數位團隊研究並核准。

all.en: Competitive monitoring will flag rival launches that may affect our campaign timing.
all.zh: 競品監測將標示可能影響本活動時程之對手上市動態。

all.en: Crisis communication protocols are documented in case of any unforeseen issues.
all.zh: 已備妥危機溝通程序文件以因應任何突發狀況。

all.en: Post campaign analysis will inform the strategy for our autumn promotional cycle.
all.zh: 活動後分析將為秋季促銷循環之策略提供依據。

all.en: We look forward to delivering a memorable launch experience for our customers.
all.zh: 我們期待為消費者打造難忘的上市體驗。

all.en: Audience segmentation strategies leverage first party data collected from our loyalty program.
all.zh: 受眾分眾策略運用我們忠誠度計畫所蒐集之第一方資料。

all.en: Creative testing will compare three different headline variants during the first two weeks.
all.zh: 創意測試將於前兩週比較三種不同之標題版本。

all.en: Influencer briefing sessions will be held one week before each scheduled content drop.
all.zh: 網紅簡報會議將於每次內容上線前一週舉行。

all.en: Compliance training for all influencer partners covers required disclosure language.
all.zh: 所有網紅夥伴之合規訓練涵蓋必要揭露用語。

all.en: Brand safety controls will block our ads from appearing alongside inappropriate content.
all.zh: 品牌安全機制將阻擋本品廣告與不適當內容並列展示。

all.en: Audience retargeting pools refresh weekly based on engagement and website visit signals.
all.zh: 受眾再行銷名單依互動與網站造訪訊號每週更新。

all.en: Conversion tracking across all platforms feeds into our centralized attribution dashboard.
all.zh: 所有平台之轉換追蹤皆匯入本公司集中式歸因儀表板。

all.en: Sentiment analysis tools monitor brand mentions and flag emerging conversation themes daily.
all.zh: 情緒分析工具每日監控品牌提及並標示新興討論主題。

all.en: Quarterly business reviews will benchmark our results against industry standard performance metrics.
all.zh: 季度業務檢視將以業界標準績效指標衡量本公司表現。

all.en: Thank you to every team member contributing to this important strategic initiative.
all.zh: 感謝為此重要策略倡議貢獻心力的每一位團隊成員。

all.en: Honestly, the day we discovered our hashtag was trending on TikTok, the whole office cheered for a solid minute.
all.zh: 老實說我們主題標籤在 TikTok 上熱門起來那天，整個辦公室歡呼了整整一分鐘。

all.en: My intern actually came up with the best caption idea while we were grabbing bubble tea downstairs.
all.zh: 我們去樓下買珍奶時，實習生居然想出了最棒的貼文文案點子。

all.en: Don't sign with a creator who hasn't disclosed sponsored content properly on past partnerships.
all.zh: 別跟過去合作沒有妥善揭露業配的創作者簽約。

all.en: I keep a folder of competitor posts on my phone just to spot any pattern shifts we might want to ride.
all.zh: 我手機裡會收藏一個競品貼文資料夾，方便找出我們可以順勢操作的趨勢變化。

all.en: Honestly, the influencer who took our briefing seriously delivered videos that felt natural and totally on brand.
all.zh: 老實說那位認真看簡報的網紅，產出的影片自然又超符合品牌調性。

all.en: Be sure to reply to every meaningful comment, even a quick heart emoji makes followers feel seen by the brand.
all.zh: 務必回覆每則有意義的留言，就算只是個愛心 emoji 也能讓粉絲覺得被品牌看見了。

all.en: My team grabbed late night ramen together the day our campaign engagement rate finally beat the benchmark.
all.zh: 活動互動率終於超越基準那天，我們團隊一起去吃了宵夜拉麵。

all.en: Don't waste budget chasing vanity metrics, focus on the conversions that actually move product off the shelves.
all.zh: 別把預算燒在虛榮指標上，重點放在能讓產品真的從架上賣出去的轉換才對。

all.en: I love when sentiment analysis catches a small complaint early so we can respond before it grows into something bigger.
all.zh: 我很喜歡情緒分析能提早抓到小抱怨，讓我們在問題擴大前就回應處理。

all.en: Honestly, the campaign wrap up dinner is always more fun when the numbers landed above what we promised leadership.
all.zh: 老實說活動結案聚餐如果數字超越對高層的承諾，整場都會玩得特別開心。
